Entity Regulation Applicants

  • WSBA Home
  • Connect & Volunteer
  • Committees, Boards & Other Groups
  • Practice of Law Board
  • Entity Regulation Pilot
  • Entity Regulation Applicants
Updated: June 26, 2026

Applications Received for the Entity Regulation Pilot Project


The entities listed below have applied to participate in the Entity Regulation Pilot Project. Inclusion on this list does NOT mean the entity is authorized to practice law in Washington. Authorized entities and profile information will be included on the WSBA legal directory.


Date ReceivedEntity NameStatusApplication*
Oct. 22, 2025Legata, Inc.Under ReviewLegata Inc. Application

Jan. 8, 2026

Law on Call, LLCUnder Review

Law on Call, LLC Application

March 10, 2026Wrk Legal, LLCUnder ReviewWrk Legal, LLC Application
Jan. 27, 2026Confido Inc. Under ReviewConfido Inc. Application

*Redacted applications are provided to the WSBA by the entity and may include redactions made pursuant to GR 12.4 and RCW 42.56, including but not limited to proprietary information, trade secrets, or data pertaining to distinctive business methodologies or information unique to the services as referenced in  RCW 42.56.270(11)).  Learn more about WSBA public records requests. 


Provide Feedback on Applications

Use this form to provide feedback or comments on an application. If an application has already been considered by the Board, feedback can no longer be accepted.

Apply for the Entity Regulation Pilot

  • Learn more and begin your application here.

Entity Regulation Pilot Project

  • Contact us.
    ✉  entityregulationpilot@wsba.org
    📞 206-733-5941

Webmaster: noelb@wsba.org

1325 Fourth Ave., Suite 600, Seattle, WA 98101-2539
